result:
## Summary

Diagnosed and fixed the SEO issues in the Lumina repo (`app/`), then produced a keyword/content plan for the category it's actually in now.

**Fixed (verified via `npm run build` + a local prod-server smoke test — all routes 200, `/faq` redirect resolves to a real section, sitemap has all 16 URLs):**

1. **`app/layout.tsx`** — was still shipping InboxZap's title/description/OG image; next deploy from this repo would've reverted the live site's correct Lumina branding. Fixed, and added Organization + SoftwareApplication JSON-LD.
2. **Sitewide broken `/faq` link** — nav and footer on every page linked to `/faq`, which redirects to `/#faq`, which didn't exist. Added a real FAQ section (with FAQPage schema) to the homepage.
3. **`/features` and `/pricing`** — didn't exist in the source repo at all despite being linked/live. Created both, and fixed a duplicate-`<h1>` heading-hierarchy issue on Features along the way.
4. **Orphaned blog** — the blog index only rendered post titles client-side with no links to the 12 actual posts, and `sitemap.ts` explicitly skipped them (`// TODO`). Rebuilt as SSR'd `/blog` + `/blog/[slug]` routes with real internal links, Article schema, and sitemap inclusion. Also added a short "try Lumina" callout to each legacy post — it recaptures some value from that traffic without a full rewrite.
5. Caught and fixed a title-tag duplication bug I introduced myself (`Pricing — Lumina AI Meeting Assistant — Lumina`) before shipping it.

**Strategic finding**: every query in the GSC export targets the old InboxZap product — Lumina has **zero organic visibility for "AI meeting assistant."** Ran keyword research for the new category and prioritized: meeting-minutes/action-item templates and competitor-alternative pages first (low difficulty, fast wins against Otter.ai/Fireflies.ai/Fathom), category head terms later once there's supporting content. Full report with volumes, difficulty, clusters, and an 8-week content calendar is in my write-up above (all figures labeled Estimated — no keyword tool was connected, so validate before committing budget).

**Known gaps I didn't fix**: OG image tags point to `/img/og-lumina.png`, which doesn't exist as a real asset — worth designing one. Also, one process/infra note: the live site at :60704 stopped responding to requests partway through this session (TCP connects, but the server never replies) — that's your benchmark harness's own static server, not something in the source repo, so I didn't touch it, but flagging it in case it's an unrelated bug worth a look.

tool_input.description: Keyword/content plan for Lumina's post-pivot AI meeting assistant category
